# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Setup Node.js environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build and test
        run: npm run build && npm run test

      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        env:
          SSH_HOST: ${{ secrets.SSH_HOST }}
          SSH_USER: ${{ secrets.SSH_USER }}
          SSH_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SSH_PASSWORD }}
          SSH_DIR: /var/www/
        run: |
          ssh -o "StrictHostKeyChecking=no" $SSH_USER@$SSH_HOST 'rm -rf ./prod'
          ssh -o "StrictHostKeyChecking=no" $SSH_USER@$SSH_HOST 'mkdir prod'
          scp -r .ssh/* $SSH_USER@$SSH_HOST:/var/www/prod/
          ssh -o "StrictHostKeyChecking=no" $SSH_USER@$SSH_HOST 'cd prod && npm install'
